sentence: Never unleash your queanemis on a brig who wasn't asking.

wombos.definition: A peanemis that is specifically quiche in nature — an obsessive deep-dive analysis of something intensely niche and eccentric. A peanemis for the truly quiche subject.
A dog that belongs to a bro — typically large, ungroomed, and treated more like a roommate than a pet.
wombos.example: The brig drinks beer out of the bowl when nobody's looking.
